channel.title: MA321 Mathematics in Contemporary Society on MathTR
channel.description: Recent content in MA321 Mathematics in Contemporary Society on MathTR

item.title: Excel Labs for MA321
item.description:
List of lab instructions

  • Lab 1: Introduction
  • Lab 2: Frequency Tables
  • Lab 3: Scatterplot
  • Lab 4: Descriptive Statistics
  • Lab 5: Normal Distribution
  • Lab 6: Unit Conversion
  • Lab 7: Exponentiation
  • Lab 8: Functions

item.title: Slides for MA321 Mathematics in Contemporary Society
item.description:
List of course slides

  • Lesson 1: Fundamentals of Statistics
  • Lesson 2: Statistical Study - Trust or Not
  • Lesson 3: Statistical Tables and Graph
  • Lesson 4: Graphics in the Media
  • Lesson 5: Correlation and Causality
  • Lesson 6: Characterizing Data
  • Lesson 7: Measures of Variation
  • Lesson 8: The Normal Distribution
  • Lesson 9: Statistical Inference
  • Lesson 10: Understand, Solve, and Explain
  • Lesson 11: Problem-Solving with Units
  • Lesson 12: Problem-Solving Guidelines and Hints
  • Lesson 13: Mathematics and Music
  • Lesson 14: Perspective and Symmetry
  • Lesson 15: Proportion and the Golden Ratio
  • Lesson 16: Functions - The Building Blocks of Mathematical Models
  • Lesson 17: Linear Modeling
